source: Android MagDataTest; iOS currently keeps the reference sample for the same malformed payload

expected.sharedOwnership: Protocol-only characterization excluded from current shared parser ownership boundary because current Android/iOS behavior is platform-specific. Use this vector to make an explicit shared parser policy before promoting this behavior to common code.

notes: Android currently throws when a compressed type-0 MAG delta block declares one 3-bit sample but omits the delta payload.
